summary: Frontend testing of TRUCKERS NAV BY TUE app after Leaflet to HERE Maps JS API v3.1 migration with Mapbox satellite-streets hybrid tiles. All core features verified: Guest login, Tutorial skip, Navigation view with satellite map (dark-gold theme), Route calculation with 3 route comparison, MUTCD speed limit signs, Truck restrictions alerts, Weather widget, Sidebar navigation, Display/HUD Layout customization, POI clustering.

minor.issue: CORS errors when accessing traffic.vector.hereapi.com directly from browser - traffic overlay tiles fail to load (known issue from previous iteration)
504 Gateway Timeout when fetching POI data along route corridor

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: HERE Maps JS API v3.1 integration working with Mapbox satellite-streets tiles as base layer
VERIFIED: Dark-gold CSS filter applied to map canvas (.here-map-satellite-dark class)
VERIFIED: Guest login flow works - navigates to COMMAND CENTER dashboard
VERIFIED: Tutorial overlay appears with SKIP button - skipping works correctly
VERIFIED: Navigation tab loads satellite map with dark-gold theme, roads and satellite imagery visible
VERIFIED: Map panning and zooming works (drag to pan, scroll to zoom)
VERIFIED: Search bar accepts destination text - typed 'Dallas, TX' and received suggestions
VERIFIED: Route calculation works - 3 routes calculated (Primary, Alt 1, Alt 2) with polylines
VERIFIED: Route comparison panel shows duration, distance, fuel cost for all 3 routes
VERIFIED: MUTCD speed limit signs appear on map after routing (SPEED LIMIT 35 visible)
VERIFIED: Turn-by-turn navigation header shows maneuver instructions ('Continue on S 8th St on W Broadway')
VERIFIED: Truck Restrictions alert panel appears with relevant warnings (toll booth transponder required)
VERIFIED: Weather widget displays temperature (41°), wind (7 MPH NNW), visibility (13.5 MI), and 3-day forecast

VERIFIED: All sidebar tabs clickable and navigate correctly (Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings, Announcements)
VERIFIED: Display/HUD Layout tab shows live preview with 22/22 visible elements, Trip Panel Position toggle, Speed Warning Tolerance options
VERIFIED: Map controls (zoom buttons, compass, 2D button, hamburger menu) are functional
VERIFIED: POI cluster provider initialized - console shows 'Cluster Provider: exists'
VERIFIED: IOWA state badge appears at bottom center of map
KNOWN ISSUE: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native (non-blocking)
KNOWN ISSUE: CORS errors for HERE traffic tiles - traffic overlay not loading (non-blocking, map still works)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: App successfully uses HERE Maps JS API v3.1 with Mapbox satellite-streets tiles as base layer. CSS filter creates dark-gold signature look. Route calculation returns 3 routes with comparison panel. MUTCD signs, truck restrictions, weather widget all working. POI clustering via H.clustering.Provider is initialized. Traffic flow overlay has CORS issues (non-blocking). Gemini TTS API key is leaked - app falls back to native TTS. Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa.

guest_login.details: Guest login button works, navigates to COMMAND CENTER dashboard

tutorial_overlay.details: Tutorial overlay appears with SKIP button, skipping works correctly

satellite_map_dark_gold_theme.details: Mapbox satellite-streets tiles load with dark-gold CSS filter applied via .here-map-satellite-dark class

map_panning_zooming.details: Map supports drag to pan and scroll to zoom via H.mapevents.Behavior

search_bar.details: Search bar accepts text, shows suggestions from HERE API, 'Dallas, TX' search returns 3 suggestions

route_calculation.details: Route calculated from Council Bluffs, Iowa to Dallas, TX - 3 routes returned (Primary: 9h 55m/660.3mi, Alt 1: 10h 37m/674.3mi, Alt 2: 10h 39m/694.3mi)

route_comparison_panel.details: Shows Primary + 2 alternates with duration, distance, fuel cost ($357.59, $365.15, $376.00)

mutcd_speed_limit_signs.details: SPEED LIMIT 35 sign visible on map after routing

turn_by_turn_navigation.details: Navigation header shows 'Continue on S 8th St on W Broadway. Go'

truck_restrictions_alert.details: TRUCK RESTRICTIONS (1) panel shows 'ROUTE GOES THROUGH TOLL BOOTH THAT REQUIRES TRANSPONDER'

weather_widget.details: Shows 41° CLOUDY, 7 MPH NNW wind, 13.5 MI visibility, 3-day forecast (43°, 52°, 45°)

sidebar_tabs.details: All 14 sidebar tabs clickable: Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings, Announcements

display_hud_layout.details: Display Layout tab shows live preview, 22/22 visible elements, Trip Panel Position (LEFT/RIGHT), Speed Warning Tolerance (+0 to +10), Navigation section with Turn Instructions, Lane Guidance, Speed Display, Arrival Bar, Maneuver Preview

map_controls.details: Zoom in/out buttons, compass rose, 2D button, hamburger menu all visible and functional

poi_cluster_provider.details: Console shows 'Cluster Provider: exists' - H.clustering.Provider initialized

state_badge.details: IOWA state badge visible at bottom center of map

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native. Non-blocking.
known_issues.cors_traffic_tiles: CORS errors for HERE traffic tiles (traffic.vector.hereapi.com) - traffic overlay not loading. Non-blocking, map still works.
known_issues.overpass_api_timeout: 504 Gateway Timeout from Overpass API when fetching POI data along route corridor. Non-blocking.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps, Mapbox, etc.)
